projectDescription: A high-conversion landing page designed to promote Halloween events or seasonal product offers with an immersive, spooky atmosphere.

productScope.mvpDefinition: A single-page scrolling experience featuring a thematic hero, event/offer details, a countdown timer, and a lead capture form.
productScope.coreOutcome: Convert visitors into event attendees or seasonal customers through a high-urgency, thematic experience.
productScope.businessGoal: Drive seasonal sales and brand engagement during the Halloween period.
productScope.audienceSummary: Individuals looking for Halloween entertainment, parties, or seasonal discounts.

roles.summary: Potential attendee or customer browsing for Halloween activities.

taskLoops.name: Event Registration Loop
taskLoops.summary: The process of a visitor landing on the page and completing a registration or purchase intent.
taskLoops.entryTrigger: Visitor arrives via social media or ad link
steps: Absorb spooky atmosphere and hero message
Review event attractions or product benefits
Observe the countdown timer for urgency
Fill out the lead capture/booking form
taskLoops.successState: Form submitted and redirected to thank-you state

capabilities.name: Thematic Visual Storytelling
capabilities.summary: Using animations, dark UI, and Halloween motifs to create an emotional connection.

capabilities.name: Conversion Engine
capabilities.summary: Capturing user data through a simplified form or CTA button.

pageMap.title: Halloween Night
pageMap.purpose: Main conversion hub for the Halloween promotion

notes: The site uses a dark-mode default to fit the Halloween theme.

designIntent.colorDirection: Deep midnight purple and charcoal backgrounds with vibrant neon orange and slime green accents.
designIntent.style: Gothic modern with glowing elements and subtle floating animations (ghosts/bats).

layoutSections.intent: Provide quick access to sections while maintaining the theme.
layoutSections.contentHints: Logo with a pumpkin icon, links to 'Attractions', 'Tickets', 'FAQ', and a 'Book Now' CTA with a glowing effect.

layoutSections.intent: Final brand touchpoint and social links.
layoutSections.contentHints: Social icons (bat-shaped), contact email, copyright, and 'Enter if you dare' newsletter sign-up.

pages.title: Halloween Promotion Home
pages.description: The main landing page designed to immerse users in the Halloween spirit and drive conversions.

sections.intent: Immediate thematic impact and primary value proposition.
sections.contentHints: Animated mist background, large 'Spooktacular' title in gothic font, primary CTA button with a pulsing 'blood-orange' glow.

sections.intent: Create FOMO and urgency for the event/offer.
sections.contentHints: Digital timer showing Days/Hours/Minutes/Seconds until Halloween night, styled with flickering neon lights.

sections.intent: Highlight key attractions or promotion details.
sections.contentHints: Grid of cards (e.g., Haunted House, Costume Contest, Midnight Feast) with spooky icons and short descriptions.

sections.intent: Present ticket options or product tiers.
sections.contentHints: Three tiers: 'Ghost' (Basic), 'Vampire' (Standard), 'Overlord' (VIP) with price points and list of inclusions.
Simple fields for Name, Email, and 'Choose your poison' (dropdown for ticket type). Submit button says 'Claim Your Spot'.
